content.content: Write the following message to the channel starting with External: Hi, i am a bot

```python
channels = get_channels()
external_channel = [c for c in channels if c.startswith("External")][0]
send_channel_message(external_channel, "Hi, i am a bot")
print("Message sent to channel:", external_channel)
```
